name: Hard Christmas Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and sugar in a saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to boil, stirring constantly until it reaches the hard crack stage.
3. Remove from heat and carefully pour onto a buttered cookie sheet.
4. Allow the candy to cool completely and harden.
5. Break into small pieces once cooled.
6. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
Low calorie stuff, this one!
